hero.label: Support
hero.title: Open source by default. Help when you need it.
hero.description: Use every OfficeIMO package under the MIT license. Get help from the community, sponsor ongoing work, or discuss a scoped commercial engagement.

cards.title: Community
cards.description: Use the complete package family in commercial, internal, and open-source projects.
features: Community help through GitHub and Discord

cards.title: Sponsor
cards.description: Fund maintenance, testing, documentation, and continued development of the open-source ecosystem.
features: Sponsor recognition where the selected tier includes it

cards.title: Commercial
cards.description: Discuss architecture guidance, priority engineering, integration help, or a support arrangement around your document workflow.

note.title: Before you contact us
paragraphs: For a public defect or feature request, start with GitHub Issues and include the package version, runtime, smallest reproducible input, and expected result.
For private or commercial work, email contact@evotec.pl with the formats, deployment environment, timeline, and the outcome your team needs.
